column1: ここから歩いて精々十分だ。
column2: ここからあるいてせいぜいじゅうぶんだ。
column3: It's at most ten minutes on foot from here.
column4: 精々 (at most, at best, no more than)
column6: sets an upper limit; 'the most it could be is X' — often implies the limit is insufficient or modest
column7: 精々: time capped at modest upper bound
column8: 精々 = at most (upper bound, often modest/disappointing); せいぜい = at most (same); たかだか = merely/at most; 少なくとも = at least (lower bound)
